member.name: T:Ivy.ChildTypeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the allowed child type for a widget when using the | operator. The analyzer uses this attribute to report IVYCHILD003 at compile time instead of throwing NotSupportedException at runtime.

member.name: M:Ivy.ChildTypeAttribute.#ctor(System.Type)
member.summary: Specifies the allowed child type for a widget when using the | operator. The analyzer uses this attribute to report IVYCHILD003 at compile time instead of throwing NotSupportedException at runtime.

member.name: T:Ivy.EventHandler`1
member.summary: Wraps Func<TEvent, ValueTask> to allow extension methods with the same name as event properties. Because this is not a delegate type, the compiler won't try to invoke it with () syntax and will fall through to extension methods.

member.name: M:Ivy.EventHandler`1.#ctor(System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Wraps Func<TEvent, ValueTask> to allow extension methods with the same name as event properties. Because this is not a delegate type, the compiler won't try to invoke it with () syntax and will fall through to extension methods.

member.name: P:Ivy.AppContext.BaseUrl
member.summary: Gets the base URL of the application (scheme + host). Useful for constructing absolute URLs for shareable links, webhooks, OAuth callbacks, etc. Example: "https://example.com"

member.name: T:Ivy.ErrorAppArgs
member.summary: Arguments for the generic error display app. Passed when showing a friendly error page for any framework or app error. Use the static factory methods and to build args from anywhere (e.g. router, auth, middleware).
member.param: Heading shown on the error page (e.g. "Ouch! :|").
Explanation shown below the title.
Optional error kind for styling.
Optional full error text (e.g. server response, stack trace). When set, "View details" sheet shows this content.

member.name: M:Ivy.ErrorAppArgs.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Arguments for the generic error display app. Passed when showing a friendly error page for any framework or app error. Use the static factory methods and to build args from anywhere (e.g. router, auth, middleware).
member.param: Heading shown on the error page (e.g. "Ouch! :|").
Explanation shown below the title.
Optional error kind for styling.
Optional full error text (e.g. server response, stack trace). When set, "View details" sheet shows this content.

member.name: P:Ivy.ErrorAppArgs.Title
member.summary: Heading shown on the error page (e.g. "Ouch! :|").

member.name: P:Ivy.ErrorAppArgs.Message
member.summary: Explanation shown below the title.

member.name: P:Ivy.ErrorAppArgs.Kind
member.summary: Optional error kind for styling.

member.name: P:Ivy.ErrorAppArgs.Details
member.summary: Optional full error text (e.g. server response, stack trace). When set, "View details" sheet shows this content.

member.name: T:Ivy.ErrorDisplay
member.summary: Shared error page layout: callout + "View details" button that opens a sheet with error content (e.g. full server response).

member.name: M:Ivy.ErrorDisplay.Build(System.String,System.String,System.Func{System.Object},Ivy.CalloutVariant,System.Nullable{Ivy.Icons},System.String)
member.param: When null, no "View details" button is shown (e.g. for NotFound, NoApps, or ServerError without details).

member.name: T:Ivy.ErrorApp
member.summary: Generic error display app. Shows a configurable title and message via UseArgs<ErrorAppArgs>(). Supports optional for different visuals. Registered via .

member.name: T:Ivy.ExceptionErrorView
member.summary: Displays an exception using the same layout as : callout + "View details" with full error in sheet. Used when Build() throws, connection fails, or content is an Exception. Keeps unchanged.

member.name: M:Ivy.ExceptionErrorView.#ctor(System.Exception)
member.summary: Displays an exception using the same layout as : callout + "View details" with full error in sheet. Used when Build() throws, connection fails, or content is an Exception. Keeps unchanged.

member.name: T:Ivy.NavigationBeacon`1
member.summary: Describes how to navigate to an app for a specific entity type.
member.typeparam: The entity type this beacon handles.

member.name: M:Ivy.NavigationBeacon`1.#ctor(System.String,System.Func{`0,System.Object})
member.summary: Describes how to navigate to an app for a specific entity type.
member.typeparam: The entity type this beacon handles.

member.name: M:Ivy.AuthProviderHelpers.GetUserAgent(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String)
member.summary: Gets the User-Agent string to use for HTTP requests from auth providers. Checks configuration for a custom value, otherwise uses Ivy-Framework/{version}.

member.name: F:Ivy.Core.AbstractWidget.CurrentViewCallSite
member.summary: Tracks the current view's callsite during Build() execution. Widgets created during Build() will use this as a fallback if they don't have their own user-code callsite.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Apps.RoutingConstantDataContext.RoutingConstantData
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Apps.RoutingConstantDataContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Apps.RoutingConstantDataContext.StringArray
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Apps.RoutingConstantDataContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Apps.RoutingConstantDataContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.AssemblyExtensions.GetLoadableTypes(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Returns all loadable types from an assembly, gracefully handling ReflectionTypeLoadException when some referenced assemblies are missing.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.DevTools.WidgetSchemaController
member.summary: Serves a JSON Schema describing every registered widget type and its props. Only available when the server is started with --enable-dev-tools.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.DevTools.WidgetSchemaController.#ctor(Ivy.ServerArgs)
member.summary: Serves a JSON Schema describing every registered widget type and its props. Only available when the server is started with --enable-dev-tools.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetController
member.summary: Controller that serves external widget assets (JS/CSS) from embedded resources.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetController.GetRegistry
member.summary: Gets the external widget registry for the frontend.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetController.GetScript(System.String)
member.summary: Serves the JavaScript module for an external widget.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetController.GetStyle(System.String)
member.summary: Serves the CSS file for an external widget (if it has one).

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo
member.summary: Information about a registered external widget.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.TypeName
member.summary: The full type name used in serialization (e.g., "MyCompany.Widgets.SuperChart").

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.ScriptPath
member.summary: The path to the JavaScript module file.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.StylePath
member.summary: Optional path to a CSS file.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.ExportName
member.summary: The name of the exported React component.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.GlobalName
member.summary: The name of the global variable created by the IIFE bundle.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.Assembly
member.summary: The assembly containing the widget and its assets.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetInfo.ResourceBasePath
member.summary: The base resource path in the assembly for embedded resources.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistryDto
member.summary: DTO sent to the frontend containing external widget registration info.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistryDto.GlobalName
member.summary: The name of the global variable created by the IIFE bundle.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry
member.summary: Registry that discovers and manages external widgets from loaded assemblies.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance of the registry.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.Initialize
member.summary: Initializes the registry by scanning all loaded assemblies for external widgets. Safe to call multiple times - will only scan once.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.RegisterAssembly(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Manually register an assembly to scan for external widgets. Useful for dynamically loaded assemblies.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.GetAll
member.summary: Gets all registered external widgets.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.GetWidget(System.String)
member.summary: Gets information about a specific external widget by type name.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.IsExternalWidget(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a widget type is an external widget.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.GetRegistryForFrontend
member.summary: Gets the registry data formatted for sending to the frontend.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.ExternalWidgets.ExternalWidgetRegistry.ReferencesIvy(System.Reflection.Assembly)
member.summary: Checks if an assembly references Ivy (required for external widgets).

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Helpers.AsyncDisposables
member.summary: A collection of objects that can be disposed together asynchronously.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite
member.summary: Represents the location in source code where a call was made.
member.param: The file path of the source file.
The line number in the source file.
The name of the member (method/property) that made the call.
The full name of the type that declares the member.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents the location in source code where a call was made.
member.param: The file path of the source file.
The line number in the source file.
The name of the member (method/property) that made the call.
The full name of the type that declares the member.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite.FilePath
member.summary: The file path of the source file.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite.LineNumber
member.summary: The line number in the source file.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite.MemberName
member.summary: The name of the member (method/property) that made the call.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite.DeclaringType
member.summary: The full name of the type that declares the member.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.Helpers.CallSite.From(System.Diagnostics.StackTrace)
member.summary: Creates a from a stack trace by finding the first frame where the declaring type is not in an Ivy assembly.
member.param: The stack trace to analyze.
member.returns: A representing the caller's location, or null if not found.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Helpers.DisposableAdapter
member.summary: Adapts an to without blocking.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.Helpers.DisposableAdapter.#ctor(System.IDisposable)
member.summary: Adapts an to without blocking.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.Helpers.ExpressionNameHelper.ExtractWhereFilterLiterals(System.Linq.Expressions.MethodCallExpression)
member.summary: Walks the expression tree to find .Where() calls and extracts string literal values from equality comparisons (e.g. f => f.FlowType == "Capital Call" yields "Capital Call").

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Helpers.JsonHelper
member.summary: Provides shared JSON serialization options for AOT/single-file compatibility.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.JsonHelper.DefaultOptions
member.summary: Default JsonSerializerOptions with reflection-based serialization enabled. Use this for dynamic/generic serialization scenarios.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.JsonHelper.CamelCaseOptions
member.summary: JsonSerializerOptions with camelCase naming and reflection-based serialization.

member.name: P:Ivy.Core.Helpers.JsonHelper.IgnoreNullOptions
member.summary: JsonSerializerOptions with camelCase naming, reflection-based serialization, and ignoring null values.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Helpers.TimerDisposable
member.summary: Wraps a to ensure Stop() is called before Dispose(), and provides a cancellation barrier to prevent post-disposal callbacks.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Server.Formatters.JsonNodeMessagePackFormatter
member.summary: A custom MessagePack formatter that serializes and deserializes System.Text.Json.Nodes.JsonNode objects. This allows Ivy's differential state engine to utilize highly efficient binary bandwidth without changing its native dictionary-free architecture.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Server.Formatters.JsonNodeResolver
member.summary: A specialized MessagePack resolver that ensures all types inheriting from are handled by the . This is critical for serializing internal types like JsonValuePrimitive<T> when they are encountered dynamically (e.g., in anonymous objects or as part of an property).

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Server.Formatters.JsonNodeSubtypeFormatter`1
member.summary: A generic formatter that wraps the base to provide an for any subtype.

member.name: T:Ivy.Core.Server.HtmlPipeline.Filters.BasePathFilter
member.summary:
Injects a <base href> and <meta name="ivy-path-base"> tag so assets and API/SignalR URLs resolve correctly regardless of the page URL.
Without a path base (local): PathToAppIdMiddleware rewrites app paths to /?appId=... internally, but the browser URL stays at /foo/bar. A <base href="/"> tag ensures relative asset paths (Vite base: './') resolve from root rather than the current page URL.
With a path base (reverse proxy): the browser URL includes the prefix (e.g. /studio/foo/bar), and relative assets must resolve under that prefix, so <base href="/studio/"> is injected along with the ivy-path-base meta tag for JS use.

member.name: M:Ivy.Core.WidgetExtensions.Children``1(``0,System.Object[])
member.summary: Replaces all children on the widget with the provided children. Use the | pipe operator to append children instead.

member.name: T:Ivy.AppBase
member.summary: Base class for Ivy apps. Equivalent to but semantically marks a class as an app. Use the to configure app metadata (title, icon, group).

member.name: M:Ivy.INavigationBeaconRegistry.HasBeacon``1
member.summary: Returns true if any app has registered a beacon for entity type T.

member.name: M:Ivy.INavigationBeaconRegistry.GetBeacon``1
member.summary: Gets the beacon for entity type T, or null if none registered.

member.name: T:Ivy.ExternalWidgetAttribute
member.summary: Marks a widget as an external widget with frontend assets bundled in the assembly.
member.param: The path to the JavaScript module file relative to the assembly's embedded resources. Example: "frontend/dist/SuperChartWidget.js"

member.name: M:Ivy.ExternalWidgetAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Marks a widget as an external widget with frontend assets bundled in the assembly.
member.param: The path to the JavaScript module file relative to the assembly's embedded resources. Example: "frontend/dist/SuperChartWidget.js"

member.name: P:Ivy.ExternalWidgetAttribute.ScriptPath
member.summary: The path to the JavaScript module file.

member.name: P:Ivy.ExternalWidgetAttribute.StylePath
member.summary: Optional path to a CSS file. If not specified, CSS should be bundled in the JS.

member.name: P:Ivy.ExternalWidgetAttribute.ExportName
member.summary: The name of the exported React component in the module. Defaults to "default" (the default export).

member.name: P:Ivy.ExternalWidgetAttribute.GlobalName
member.summary: The name of the global variable created by the IIFE bundle. This is the 'name' property in the vite.config lib options. Required for IIFE bundles that contain multiple widgets.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseIntervalExtensions.UseInterval(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Action,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Runs on a repeating interval. Pass null for to pause (dispose the timer). Pass a to start or restart the timer. The timer is automatically disposed on component unmount.

member.name: M:Ivy.Helpers.ProcessExtensions.WaitForExitOrKill(System.Diagnostics.Process,System.Int32)
member.summary: Waits for the process to exit within the specified timeout. If the timeout expires, kills the entire process tree.
member.returns: true if the process exited within the timeout; false if it was killed.

member.name: M:Ivy.Helpers.ProcessExtensions.WaitForExitOrKillAsync(System.Diagnostics.Process,System.Int32)
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the process to exit within the specified timeout. If the timeout expires, kills the entire process tree.
member.returns: true if the process exited within the timeout; false if it was killed.

member.name: M:Ivy.Helpers.ProcessExtensions.WaitForExitOrKillAsync(System.Diagnostics.Process,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously waits for the process to exit, observing the given cancellation token. If cancelled, kills the entire process tree.
member.returns: true if the process exited normally; false if it was killed due to cancellation.

member.name: M:Ivy.EnumHelper.GetDescription(System.Enum)
member.summary: Gets the display name for an enum value. Uses the [Description] attribute if present, otherwise falls back to SplitPascalCase.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseCallbackExtensions.UseCallback(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Action,System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a callback function, returning a stable delegate reference that only changes when dependencies change. This is syntactic sugar over UseMemo for callback memoization.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseCallbackExtensions.UseCallback``1(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Action{``0},System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a callback function with one parameter.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseCallbackExtensions.UseCallback``1(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``0},System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a callback function with a return value.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseCallbackExtensions.UseCallback``2(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``0,``1},System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a callback function with one parameter and a return value.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseCallbackExtensions.UseCallback``2(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Action{``0,``1},System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a callback function with two parameters.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseCallbackExtensions.UseCallback``3(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``0,``1,``2},System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a callback function with two parameters and a return value.

member.name: T:Ivy.ShowFileDialogDelegate
member.summary: Delegate for showing the file dialog. Accepts a callback that receives the selected file metadata when files are chosen. Following the UseAlert pattern, the callback is passed at invocation time, not at hook creation.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseFileDialogExtensions.UseFileDialog(Ivy.IViewContext,Ivy.IUploadHandler,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.summary: Upload mode — opens the native file dialog and uploads the selected file(s) to the server. Accepts an IUploadHandler, same as FileInput (e.g., MemoryStreamUploadHandler.Create(state)). Returns (dialogView, showFileDialog) tuple following the UseAlert pattern. Call showFileDialog(callback) to open the dialog; the callback receives file metadata after upload.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseFileDialogExtensions.UseFileDialog(Ivy.IViewContext,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: PathOnly mode — opens the native file dialog and returns file metadata (name, content type, size) without uploading. Useful when only the file reference is needed. Returns (dialogView, showFileDialog) tuple following the UseAlert pattern. Call showFileDialog(callback) to open the dialog; the callback receives file metadata.

member.name: T:Ivy.ShowFolderDialogDelegate
member.summary: Delegate for showing the folder dialog. Accepts a callback that receives the folder entries when a folder is selected. Following the UseAlert pattern.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseFolderDialogExtensions.UseFolderDialog(Ivy.IViewContext)
member.summary: Opens the native folder picker dialog. Returns the list of entries (files and subdirectories) in the selected folder. On Chromium, uses showDirectoryPicker for true folder selection. On other browsers, falls back to input[webkitdirectory]. Returns (dialogView, showFolderDialog) tuple following the UseAlert pattern. Call showFolderDialog(callback) to open the dialog; the callback receives folder entries.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseMemoExtensions.UseMemo``1(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``0},System.Object[])
member.summary: Memoizes a computed value, only recomputing when dependencies change. Uses value equality (Equals) to compare dependencies.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseMemoExtensions.UseMemo``1(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Memoizes a computed value, computing it only once on first render. Useful for expensive one-time computations that don't depend on changing state.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseNavigationBeaconExtensions.UseNavigationBeacon``1(Ivy.IViewContext)
member.summary: Returns a beacon for entity type T if one is registered, enabling type-safe navigation.

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryOptions.RevalidateOnMount
member.summary: Whether to revalidate data on mount/subscribe. Default: true (SWR pattern). When true: always revalidates in background (unless Expiration is set). When false with initialValue: populates cache with initialValue, no fetch. When false without initialValue: fetches once, no background revalidation. Useful for pre-populating from a parent query (e.g., list â†’ detail pattern).

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryOptions.KeepPrevious
member.summary: When true, keeps showing previous data while fetching with a new key. Ideal for pagination to avoid loading flicker. Default: false.

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryOptions.RefreshInterval
member.summary: Automatically revalidate data at this interval while there are active subscribers. Null disables polling. Example: TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30) for 30s polling.

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryServiceOptions.EvictionInterval
member.summary: How often to scan for expired entries. Default: 60 seconds.

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryServiceOptions.OrphanedEntryTtl
member.summary: How long to keep entries with no subscribers before eviction. Default: 60 minutes.

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryServiceOptions.MaxEntries
member.summary: Maximum entries before LRU eviction kicks in. Default: 10,000. Null = unlimited.

member.name: P:Ivy.QueryServiceOptions.RefreshTickInterval
member.summary: How often to check for entries needing refresh. Default: 1 second. Lower values = more precise refresh timing but higher CPU usage.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseQueryExtensions.UseQuery``2(Ivy.IViewContext,``1,System.Func{``1,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},Ivy.QueryOptions,``0,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Object})
member.summary: Fetches and caches data with SWR-style revalidation. When key is null, returns an idle result without fetching (conditional fetching).

member.name: M:Ivy.UseQueryExtensions.UseQuery``2(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``1},System.Func{``1,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},Ivy.QueryOptions,``0,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Object})
member.summary: Fetches and caches data with a computed key for dependent fetching. When keyFactory returns null, returns an idle result without fetching. Re-evaluates the key on each render, enabling dependent data patterns.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseQueryExtensions.UseQuery``2(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``1},System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},Ivy.QueryOptions,``0,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Object})
member.summary: Fetches and caches data with a computed key for dependent fetching. When keyFactory returns null, returns an idle result without fetching.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseQueryExtensions.UseQuery``2(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{``1},System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},Ivy.QueryOptions,``0,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Object})
member.summary: Fetches and caches data with a computed key for dependent fetching. When keyFactory returns null, returns an idle result without fetching.

member.name: T:Ivy.ShowSaveDialogDelegate
member.summary: Delegate for showing the save dialog. Accepts a callback that receives the save result when the file is saved. Following the UseAlert pattern.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseSaveDialogExtensions.UseSaveDialog(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Byte[]}},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Opens the native save dialog. The factory provides the file content when triggered. On Chromium, uses showSaveFilePicker for true "Save As" UX. On other browsers, falls back to a programmatic download. Returns (dialogView, showSaveDialog) tuple following the UseAlert pattern. Call showSaveDialog(callback) to open the dialog; the callback receives the save result.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseStreamExtensions.UseStream``1(Ivy.IViewContext,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a server-to-client stream that can push data to the frontend in real time. Attach the returned stream to a widget property (e.g. ) and call to send data.
member.param: The view context (typically accessed via Context).
When true (default), data written before the frontend subscribes is buffered and automatically flushed once the subscription is established. When false, data written before subscription is discarded.
member.typeparam: The type of data to stream (e.g. ).

member.name: P:Ivy.ServerArgs.BasePath
member.summary: Base path for the application when running behind a reverse proxy (e.g., "/myapp").

member.name: P:Ivy.ServerArgs.IsCliCommand
member.summary: True when the process is running a CLI-only command (--describe, --describe-connection, --test-connection) that needs DI but should not bind a real port.

member.name: M:Ivy.ExceptionHints.GetHint(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a hint for the given exception type name, or null if no hint is available.

member.name: T:Ivy.IQueryService
member.summary: Public interface for query cache management operations. Use this to invalidate or revalidate cached queries by tag or predicate.

member.name: M:Ivy.IQueryService.InvalidateByTag(System.Object)
member.summary: Invalidate all query entries with the specified tag.

member.name: M:Ivy.IQueryService.RevalidateByTag(System.Object)
member.summary: Revalidate all query entries with the specified tag.

member.name: M:Ivy.IQueryService.Invalidate(System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Invalidate all query entries where the predicate returns true for the key.

member.name: M:Ivy.IQueryService.Revalidate(System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Revalidate all query entries where the predicate returns true for the key.

member.name: M:Ivy.IQueryService.Clear
member.summary: Clear all query entries.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Subscribe``2(Ivy.IState{Ivy.QueryResult{``0}},System.Guid,``1,System.Object,System.String,System.Func{``1,System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},Ivy.QueryOptions,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Object},``0)
member.summary: Subscribe to a query entry. Returns an IDisposable that unsubscribes when disposed. Fetch is automatically cancelled when all subscribers dispose.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Mutate``1(System.String,``0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Optimistic update with optional revalidation.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Revalidate(System.String)
member.summary: Force revalidation of a query entry.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Invalidate(System.String)
member.summary: Invalidate a specific query entry. Clears the cached value and triggers a re-fetch if there are subscribers.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.InvalidateByTag(System.Object)
member.summary: Invalidate all query entries with the specified tag.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.RevalidateByTag(System.Object)
member.summary: Revalidate all query entries with the specified tag.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Invalidate(System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Invalidate all query entries where the predicate returns true for the key.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Revalidate(System.Func{System.Object,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Revalidate all query entries where the predicate returns true for the key.

member.name: M:Ivy.QueryService.Clear
member.summary: Clear all query entries.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.Boolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.Theme
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.ThemeColors
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.ThemeColorScheme
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:Ivy.ThemeJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: M:Ivy.MenuItemExtensions.FlattenWithPath(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Ivy.MenuItem},System.String)
member.summary: Flattens the menu tree and yields leaf items along with their folder path (parent labels). Path is the concatenated labels of ancestors, e.g. "Widgets / Primitives" for an item under Primitives within Widgets.

member.name: M:Ivy.FormBuilder`1.OnSubmit(System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Sets a callback that is invoked after the form passes validation but before the model state is updated. Use this for async operations like saving to a database.

member.name: M:Ivy.FormBuilder`1.Disabled(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disables the entire form - all input fields and the submit button.

member.name: M:Ivy.UseFormExtensions.UseUploadAwareSubmit``1(Ivy.IViewContext,Ivy.IState{``0},System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{System.Boolean}})
member.summary: Creates upload-aware form submission handling with toast notifications for in-progress uploads.

member.name: T:Ivy.Validators
member.summary: Shared validation for email, tel, url, and password. Used by form validation and TextInput on-blur when built inside a view.

member.name: M:Ivy.Validators.ValidateForVariant(System.Object,Ivy.TextInputVariant,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns (true, null) if valid, (false, errorMessage) if invalid. Empty/whitespace is treated as valid (required handled separately).

member.name: T:Ivy.RichTextBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for . Use to create an instance.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Run(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Boolean,System.String,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add a text run with optional styling.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Bold(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Boolean,System.String,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add a bold text run.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Italic(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Boolean,System.String,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add an italic text run.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.StrikeThrough(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Boolean,System.String,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add a strikethrough text run.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Muted(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Boolean,System.String,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add a muted (secondary color) text run.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Word(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.String,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add a plain text run with Word=true for auto-spacing.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Link(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.Boolean,Ivy.LinkTarget)
member.summary: Add a link run. Links are words by default (auto-spaced).

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.LineBreak
member.summary: Add a line break run.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.NoWrap
member.summary: Prevent text from wrapping.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Overflow(Ivy.Overflow)
member.summary: Set overflow behavior.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Density(Ivy.Density)
member.summary: Set the density of the rich text block.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.Align(Ivy.TextAlignment)
member.summary: Set text alignment.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.UseStream(Ivy.IWriteStream{Ivy.TextRun})
member.summary: Attach a stream for dynamically appending runs after the initial .

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.OnLinkClick(System.Func{Ivy.Event{Ivy.RichTextBlock,System.String},System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Set a callback invoked when a link run is clicked. Receives the link URL.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.OnLinkClick(System.Action{Ivy.Event{Ivy.RichTextBlock,System.String}})
member.summary: Set a callback invoked when a link run is clicked. Receives the link URL.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextBuilder.OnLinkClick(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Set a callback invoked when a link run is clicked. Receives the link URL.

member.name: T:Ivy.RichTextMarkdownParser
member.summary: Incrementally parses markdown text and emits TextRun objects. Designed for streaming: call with each token as it arrives. The parser maintains internal state to handle multi-character markdown syntax (e.g., ** for bold, ``` for code blocks) across token boundaries.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextMarkdownParser.Append(System.String)
member.summary: Append a new text token (from a streaming LLM response) and return any TextRun objects that can be emitted so far.

member.name: M:Ivy.RichTextMarkdownParser.Flush
member.summary: Signal end of stream. Flushes any remaining buffered content as final runs.

member.name: M:Ivy.Text.Rich
member.summary: Create a for composing inline text with mixed formatting.

member.name: M:Ivy.TextBuilder.Anchor(System.String)
member.summary: Sets an explicit anchor ID for URL hash navigation on heading variants.

member.name: M:Ivy.TextBuilder.Anchor
member.summary: Auto-generates an anchor ID by slugifying the heading text (lowercase, hyphens, strip non-alphanumeric).

member.name: T:Ivy.AudioInput
member.summary: Allows users to record audio directly from the browser.

member.name: T:Ivy.Badge
member.summary: A small visual indicator for status, counts, or labeling.

member.name: T:Ivy.Blade
member.summary: A slide-out panel component for secondary content or actions.

member.name: T:Ivy.BladeContainer
member.summary: The container managing the stack of active blades.

member.name: T:Ivy.BreadcrumbItem
member.summary: Represents a single breadcrumb item with label and optional click action.

member.name: M:Ivy.BreadcrumbItem.#ctor(System.String,System.Action,System.Nullable{Ivy.Icons},System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Represents a single breadcrumb item with label and optional click action.

member.name: T:Ivy.Breadcrumbs
member.summary: A secondary navigation component showing hierarchical location with clickable trail.

member.name: T:Ivy.Button
member.summary: An interactive element for triggering actions or navigation.

member.name: T:Ivy.CameraInput
member.summary: Allows users to capture photos from their device's webcam/camera.

member.name: T:Ivy.Card
member.summary: A flexible container with a border and shadow for grouping related content.

member.name: T:Ivy.AreaChart
member.summary: Renders data as an area chart for visualizing quantitative progression over time.

member.name: T:Ivy.BarChart
member.summary: Displays categorical data using rectangular bars with proportional heights or lengths.

member.name: T:Ivy.ChordChart
member.summary: A circular visualization showing inter-relationships and flows between entities.

member.name: T:Ivy.FunnelChart
member.summary: A funnel chart that visualizes data as progressively narrowing stages, useful for conversion rates and process flows.

member.name: T:Ivy.GaugeChart
member.summary: A circular gauge/dial widget for displaying KPI values such as progress, completion, or load.

member.name: T:Ivy.LineChart
member.summary: A chart that displays information as a series of data points connected by straight line segments.

member.name: T:Ivy.PieChart
member.summary: A circular statistical graphic divided into slices to illustrate numerical proportion.

member.name: T:Ivy.RadarChart
member.summary: A multi-dimensional chart displaying data across multiple axes radiating from a center point, ideal for comparing profiles and skill assessments.

member.name: T:Ivy.SankeyChart
member.summary: A flow visualization where arrow widths are proportional to flow quantities between nodes.

member.name: T:Ivy.ScatterChart
member.summary: A chart that displays data points on a two-dimensional coordinate system, optionally with size and color encoding.

member.name: T:Ivy.Chat
member.summary: A complete chat interface component with message history and input.

member.name: P:Ivy.RowActionClickEventArgs.Id
member.summary: Id of the row where the event was fired.

member.name: P:Ivy.RowActionClickEventArgs.Tag
member.summary: Tag of the menu item that was clicked.

member.name: T:Ivy.DataTable
member.summary: A comprehensive grid for displaying and interacting with rows of data, supporting sorting and pagination.

member.name: T:Ivy.Detail
member.summary: A specific detail item within a Details view.

member.name: T:Ivy.Details
member.summary: Displays a grouped collection of read-only information or properties.

member.name: T:Ivy.Dialog
member.summary: A modal window that interrupts the current workflow to request information or confirmation.

member.name: T:Ivy.DialogBody
member.summary: The main content area container for a Dialog.

member.name: T:Ivy.DialogFooter
member.summary: The bottom area of a Dialog, typically used for action buttons.

member.name: T:Ivy.DialogHeader
member.summary: The top area of a Dialog containing the title and close button.

member.name: T:Ivy.DropDownMenu
member.summary: A menu that appears when an element is clicked.

member.name: T:Ivy.Animation
member.summary: Applies CSS animations or transitions to its child content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Confetti
member.summary: A fun visual effect that simulates falling confetti, useful for celebrations.

member.name: T:Ivy.Expandable
member.summary: A widget that can expand or collapse its content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Form
member.summary: A container for grouping input fields and validation logic.

member.name: T:Ivy.AsyncSelectInputView`1
member.summary: A selection input that fetches options asynchronously. Ideal for large datasets, foreign key lookups, or any scenario where options are loaded on-demand.
member.typeparam: The type of the selected value.

member.name: T:Ivy.BoolInput
member.summary: A checkbox or switch for toggling boolean values.

member.name: T:Ivy.CodeInput`1
member.summary: An editor input optimized for writing code snippets.

member.name: T:Ivy.ColorInput
member.summary: An input field for selecting colors.

member.name: T:Ivy.ContentInput`1
member.summary: A text input with integrated file attachment support via drag-and-drop, clipboard paste, and file picker.

member.name: T:Ivy.DateRangeInput`1
member.summary: An input for selecting a start and end date.

member.name: T:Ivy.DateTimeInput`1
member.summary: An input for selecting both date and time.

member.name: T:Ivy.FeedbackInput`1
member.summary: A specialized input for collecting user feedback or ratings.

member.name: T:Ivy.FileInput`1
member.summary: Allows users to select and upload files.

member.name: T:Ivy.IconInputBase
member.summary: An input field for selecting an icon from the Ivy icon set (Lucide icons).

member.name: T:Ivy.NumberInput`1
member.summary: An input field restricted to numerical values.

member.name: T:Ivy.NumberRangeInput`1
member.summary: An input field for selecting a numeric range with two draggable handles.

member.name: T:Ivy.Option`1
member.summary: Represents a selectable option with a display label and a typed value. Used with , SelectInput, and other selection widgets.
member.typeparam: The type of the underlying value.

member.name: M:Ivy.Option`1.#ctor(`0)
member.summary: Creates an option using value.ToString() as the display label.
member.param: The value for this option. Its ToString() result is used as the label.

member.name: M:Ivy.Option`1.#ctor(System.String,`0,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{Ivy.Icons},System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an option with an explicit label and value.
member.param: The display text shown to the user in the dropdown.
The underlying value stored when this option is selected.
Optional group name for categorizing options.
Optional description shown below the label.
Optional icon displayed next to the label.
Whether this option is disabled and cannot be selected.
Optional tooltip shown on hover.

member.name: T:Ivy.ReadOnlyInput
member.summary: Displays a value that cannot be edited by the user.

member.name: T:Ivy.SelectInput`1
member.summary: A dropdown list for selecting one or more options.

member.name: T:Ivy.SignatureInput`1
member.summary: A canvas-based signature capture widget that allows users to draw signatures directly in the browser.

member.name: T:Ivy.TextInputBuildContext
member.summary: Internal: set during view Build() so ToEmailInput() etc. can validate on blur without duplicating methods.

member.name: T:Ivy.TextInput
member.summary: A standard input field for single-line text.

member.name: M:Ivy.TextInputExtensions.ApplyVariantValidation(Ivy.IViewContext,Ivy.IAnyState,Ivy.TextInputBase,Ivy.TextInputVariant)
member.summary: Wire blur validation for variant; must already be bound to .

member.name: M:Ivy.TextInputExtensions.ToEmailInput(Ivy.IAnyState,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Email/Password/Url/Tel: validates on blur when built inside a view (context set). Same as ToTextInput(..., variant).

member.name: T:Ivy.Widgets.Internal.SidebarNews
member.summary: Displays a news feed, typically in a sidebar.

member.name: T:Ivy.Kanban
member.summary: A visual board for managing tasks and workflows.

member.name: T:Ivy.KanbanCard
member.summary: A single card item within a Kanban board.

member.name: T:Ivy.FloatingPanel
member.summary: A panel that floats above other content, often used for popovers or tool palettes.

member.name: T:Ivy.FooterLayout
member.summary: A layout container for footer content, typically pinned to the bottom.

member.name: T:Ivy.GridLayout
member.summary: A layout using the CSS Grid system for complex arrangements.

member.name: T:Ivy.HeaderLayout
member.summary: A standard header layout with branding and navigation areas.

member.name: T:Ivy.ResizablePanelGroup
member.summary: A container for panels that can be resized relative to each other.

member.name: T:Ivy.ResizablePanel
member.summary: A panel within a group that can be resized by the user.

member.name: T:Ivy.SidebarLayout
member.summary: A common application layout with a collapsible sidebar and main content area.

member.name: M:Ivy.SidebarLayoutExtensions.Resizable(Ivy.SidebarLayout,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables drag-to-resize on the sidebar border. Users can drag to adjust the sidebar width at runtime. Use .Width(Size.Px(300).Min(Size.Px(200)).Max(Size.Px(600))) to customize constraints. Default constraints when resizable is 200px min and 600px max.

member.name: T:Ivy.StackLayout
member.summary: Arranges items sequentially in a horizontal or vertical stack.

member.name: T:Ivy.TabsLayout
member.summary: Organizes content into separate views accessible via tabs.

member.name: T:Ivy.Tab
member.summary: A single tab item within a TabsLayout.

member.name: T:Ivy.List
member.summary: Displays a sequence of items in a list format.

member.name: T:Ivy.ListItem
member.summary: A single item within a List or SidebarMenu.

member.name: T:Ivy.Pagination
member.summary: Navigation controls for paging through lists or data.

member.name: T:Ivy.AppHost
member.summary: The root container for an Ivy application.

member.name: T:Ivy.Article
member.summary: A container for article content.

member.name: T:Ivy.AudioPlayer
member.summary: Plays audio files.

member.name: T:Ivy.AutoScroll
member.summary: A scrollable container that automatically scrolls to the bottom when content grows.

member.name: M:Ivy.AutoScroll.FromChildren``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Builds an from a sequence of child widgets so callers do not need ToArray<object>() (C# does not treat T[] as object[] for params).

member.name: P:Ivy.AutoScroll.Disabled
member.summary: When false (default), new content keeps the view pinned to the bottom. When true, the user scrolls manually and the view does not jump on updates.

member.name: T:Ivy.Avatar
member.summary: A graphical representation of a user or entity.

member.name: T:Ivy.Box
member.summary: A simple container for grouping content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Callout
member.summary: A highlighted box for important information.

member.name: T:Ivy.CodeBlock
member.summary: Displays inline or block code snippets.

member.name: T:Ivy.Embed
member.summary: Embeds external content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Empty
member.summary: A placeholder widget representing no content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Error
member.summary: Displays error messages.

member.name: T:Ivy.Fragment
member.summary: A logical container that renders its children without a wrapper element.

member.name: T:Ivy.Html
member.summary: Renders raw HTML content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Icon
member.summary: Displays an icon.

member.name: T:Ivy.Iframe
member.summary: Embeds an iframe.

member.name: T:Ivy.Image
member.summary: Displays an image.

member.name: T:Ivy.Json
member.summary: Displays JSON data.

member.name: T:Ivy.Kbd
member.summary: Represents keyboard input.

member.name: T:Ivy.Loading
member.summary: A loading indicator.

member.name: T:Ivy.Markdown
member.summary: Renders markdown content.

member.name: T:Ivy.TextRun
member.summary: A styled text segment within a RichTextBlock. Each run carries its own formatting: bold, italic, strikethrough, text color, and highlight color. When is true, a space is automatically prepended before the content (except for the first run in the block). When is set, the run is rendered as a clickable link. controls whether the link opens in a new tab or the same tab.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.LineBreak
member.summary: When true, renders as a line break.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.Code
member.summary: When true, renders content in monospace/code style.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.Heading
member.summary: Heading level (1-6). When set, renders as a heading element.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.Paragraph
member.summary: When true, this run starts a new paragraph.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.BulletItem
member.summary: Bullet list item nesting level (1+). When greater than 0, renders as a bullet point.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.OrderedItem
member.summary: Ordered list item number. When greater than 0, renders as a numbered list item.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.HorizontalRule
member.summary: When true, renders as a horizontal rule.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.CodeBlock
member.summary: When set, renders content as a fenced code block with the given language.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.Blockquote
member.summary: When true, renders as a blockquote.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.Table
member.summary: When set, contains raw markdown table text to render via the markdown renderer.

member.name: P:Ivy.TextRun.Math
member.summary: When set, contains LaTeX math content to render. "inline" for inline math, "display" for display math.

member.name: T:Ivy.RichTextBlock
member.summary: Displays rich text composed of individually styled segments. Supports streaming new runs via . When streaming is used, provides the initial runs; all streamed runs are appended after these on the frontend.

member.name: P:Ivy.RichTextBlock.Runs
member.summary: The text runs to display. When is set, these serve as the initial runs — streamed runs are appended after them on the frontend.

member.name: P:Ivy.RichTextBlock.Stream
member.summary: Optional stream for dynamically appending runs after . Create with Context.UseStream<TextRun>() and attach via . Call to push new runs to the frontend in real time.

member.name: T:Ivy.Script
member.summary: Loads external JavaScript files or executes inline JavaScript code.

member.name: T:Ivy.Separator
member.summary: A visual separator line.

member.name: T:Ivy.Skeleton
member.summary: A placeholder for content that is loading.

member.name: T:Ivy.Spacer
member.summary: Adds empty space between elements. By default, grows to fill available space in the parent layout's direction.

member.name: T:Ivy.Stepper
member.summary: A step-by-step progress indicator.

member.name: T:Ivy.Svg
member.summary: Renders SVG content.

member.name: T:Ivy.Terminal
member.summary: Displays a command-line interface or log output.

member.name: T:Ivy.TextBlock
member.summary: Displays text.

member.name: T:Ivy.VideoPlayer
member.summary: Plays video files.

member.name: T:Ivy.Xml
member.summary: Displays XML data.

member.name: T:Ivy.Progress
member.summary: A visual indicator of an operation's progress.

member.name: T:Ivy.Sheet
member.summary: A side-aligned modal panel for editing or displaying distinct sub-tasks.

member.name: M:Ivy.SheetExtensions.Resizable(Ivy.Sheet,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables drag-to-resize on the inner edge of the sheet. Users can drag to adjust the sheet width/height at runtime. Use .Width(Size.Rem(24).Min(Size.Px(200)).Max(Size.Px(800))) to customize constraints. Default constraints when resizable: 200px min and 80vw max.

member.name: T:Ivy.Slot
member.summary: A placeholder for dynamic content injection.

member.name: T:Ivy.ProgressSegment
member.summary: A segment within a stacked progress bar.

member.name: M:Ivy.ProgressSegment.#ctor(System.Double,System.Nullable{Ivy.Colors},System.String)
member.summary: A segment within a stacked progress bar.

member.name: T:Ivy.StackedProgress
member.summary: A progress bar that displays multiple colored segments side by side, each proportional to its value.

member.name: T:Ivy.Table
member.summary: A standard HTML table container.

member.name: T:Ivy.TableCell
member.summary: A data cell within a TableRow.

member.name: T:Ivy.TableRow
member.summary: A row of cells within a Table.

member.name: T:Ivy.Toolbar
member.summary: A container for organizing action buttons and controls with grouping and separators.

member.name: T:Ivy.Tooltip
member.summary: A brief informational message that appears when hovering over an element.

member.name: M:Ivy.TooltipExtensions.WithTooltip(Ivy.Core.IWidget,Ivy.Core.IView)
member.summary: Wraps the widget with a tooltip whose content is built from a view.

member.name: M:Ivy.TooltipExtensions.WithTooltip(Ivy.Core.IView,Ivy.Core.IView)
member.summary: Wraps the view with a tooltip whose content is built from a view.

member.name: P:Ivy.TreeRowActionClickEventArgs.ItemValue
member.summary: Tag of the tree item where the action was clicked.

member.name: P:Ivy.TreeRowActionClickEventArgs.ActionTag
member.summary: Tag of the menu item (action) that was clicked.

member.name: T:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DatatableReflection
member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from Protos/datatable.proto

member.name: P:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DatatableReflection.Descriptor
member.summary: File descriptor for Protos/datatable.proto

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.SortFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "sort" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.FilterFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "filter" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.OffsetFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "offset" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.LimitFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "limit" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.SelectColumnsFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "select_columns" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.AggregationsFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "aggregations" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.ConnectionIdFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "connectionId" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.SourceIdFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "sourceId" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableQuery.VersionTokenFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "version_token" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.SortOrder.ColumnFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "column" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.SortOrder.DirectionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "direction" field.

member.name: T:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter
member.summary: Recursive filter structure

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter.ConditionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "condition" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter.GroupFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "group" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter.NegateFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "negate" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter.InvalidQueryFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "invalid_query" field.

member.name: P:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter.InvalidQuery
member.summary: When set, indicates an unparseable query that should be processed by the agent

member.name: T:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Filter.NodeOneofCase
member.summary: Enum of possible cases for the "node" oneof.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Condition.ColumnFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "column" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Condition.FunctionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "function" field.

member.name: P:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Condition.Function
member.summary: e.g. "equals", "greaterThan", "inSet", "contains"

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Condition.ArgsFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "args" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.FilterGroup.OpFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "op" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.FilterGroup.FiltersFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "filters" field.

member.name: T:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.FilterGroup.Types
member.summary: Container for nested types declared in the FilterGroup message type.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Aggregation.ColumnFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "column" field.

member.name: F:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Aggregation.FunctionFieldNumber
member.summary: Field number for the "function" field.

member.name: P:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.Aggregation.Function
member.summary: e.g. "sum", "avg", "min", "max", "count"

member.summary: Field number for the "arrow_ipc_stream" field.

member.summary: Service descriptor

member.name: T:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableService.DataTableServiceBase
member.summary: Base class for server-side implementations of DataTableService

member.name: M:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableService.BindService(Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableService.DataTableServiceBase)
member.summary: Creates service definition that can be registered with a server
member.param: An object implementing the server-side handling logic.

member.name: M:Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableService.BindService(Grpc.Core.ServiceBinderBase,Ivy.Protos.DataTable.DataTableService.DataTableServiceBase)
member.summary: Register service method with a service binder with or without implementation. Useful when customizing the service binding logic. Note: this method is part of an experimental API that can change or be removed without any prior notice.
member.param: Service methods will be bound by calling AddMethod on this object.
An object implementing the server-side handling logic.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
